title: MinePererecos
description:
O servidor da comunidade. (
The community server.)
body:
# **MinePererecos Serverpack**

Explore the world of Minecraft 1.21.1 with a modpack designed just for survival players seeking a fluid and streamlined experience. This modpack has been carefully curated to retain the challenging nature of survival, while also adding modules focused on performance optimization, ensuring smooth gameplay even in the most stressful scenarios. Immerse yourself in thrilling adventures without fear of lag, and experience how survival can be even more rewarding in a world that responds promptly to your orders.

This modpack is designed for players who wish to participate in the Brazilian server "MinePererecos." With a variety of optimizations and customizations configured by default, it aims to make it easier for new players to join the server.

Who should use this modpack?
While everyone is welcome to use and suggest changes or additions to the modpack, it will always focus on improving the experience for players on the specific server it was created for. Although it works perfectly well in singleplayer mode, some options may have been disabled to optimize the multiplayer experience, making it less ideal for solo play.

IMPORTANT NOTICE
**The modpack has no direct affiliation with the Brazilian content creator "MeiaUm"**. The server is managed by admins from his official Discord community, but all content related to this modpack, including links, Discord channels, and the in-game server itself, are independent of the content creator's official projects.

The modpack is officially maintained and updated by the in-game server moderators, with all updates and changes announced on the appropriate Discord channels as well as in changelogs on platforms like Modrinth.

+ Sodium
+ Shaders
+ Many Optifine Features
+ Connected Textures

Attributions:

Stay True (Version 1.20)

Resource Pack: Stay True
Source: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
Description: This resource pack enhances the visual experience of Minecraft while keeping the original aesthetic.
MandalasGUI + Dark Mode (Version 1.20.5)

Resource Pack: MandalasGUI + Dark Mode
Source: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalasgui-darkmode](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)
Description: A resource pack that adds a beautiful mandala-themed GUI with an optional dark mode for a more immersive experience.
